text:
Once upon a time in the charming little town of Willow Creek, there lived a curious fox named Felix. Felix was particularly fond of observing the daily routines of the creatures of his woodland habitat. One crisp autumn afternoon, he happened upon a group of squirrels hoarding acorns for the winter.

Felix quietly approached them. "Hey there," he said softly. "Mind if I join you?"

The squirrels looked up, surprised. "Oh! A friend?" one chipmunk exclaimed. "We're saving these for future generations. You wouldn't want to miss them."

Felix nodded thoughtfully. "I wouldn't mind them very much—" He paused thoughtfully. "Actually... I think I would."

With that, Felix gathered a few acorns into his bag. The squirrels chattered amongst themselves in delighted surprise. Felix grinned broadly.

Off he went, humming a little song about hoarding treasures. Every night, he'd distribute some acorns to the birds on the
